creator: jailbird@fdf.net
text:
Sorry for the delay in answers. I was trying to replace a bad DIMM in my 2nd identical machine so I could do some bisecting without taking the one machine down.

I do know that 565c887 worked (so Aug 31) and e39e6be didn't (Sep 20th). So I have it down to a 20 day window, working on shrinking it more.
